item.title: Market Regime: 🟢 Recovery
item.description:
This is an automated market signal summary for informational purposes only. It is not financial advice.
Risk commentary: Risk appetite is improving in this Recovery regime, but elevated commodity volatility (OVX) and still-high yields keep macro risks present. Equities are trending higher versus long-term averages, yet the negative income spread still structurally favors fixed income on a pure yield basis. Monitor VIX and TNX for any rapid shifts that could reverse the rally; current conditions appear stable.
Market summary: - SPY: 738.18, above 200-day MA 674.46 — bullish/above-trend (stable). - QQQ: 707.24, above 100-day MA 620.38 — growth leadership intact. - ARKK: +10.36% over 3 months — risk-on asset strength. - VIX: 17.99 — modest volatility, consistent with a recovery environment. - TNX (10Y yield): 4.46% — still-elevated yield backdrop supporting bond income. - Income spread (S&P dividend yield 0.99% vs 10Y 4.46%): spread = -3.47% — favors bonds on yield advantage. - OVX: 75.69 (regime: mid) — oil volatility elevated; watch energy/commodity-driven risk. - Mortgage rate: 6.37% (condition: Neutral) — housing finance remains costly but stable. - Overall risk posture: recovery/risk-on but with yield and commodity volatility risks; conditions currently stable.
Raw data available in /data.

item.title: Market Regime: 🟢 Recovery
item.description:
This is an automated market signal summary for informational purposes only. It is not financial advice.
Risk commentary: Recovery continues but is uneven — equities are above long-term averages and volatility is moderate, while yields remain elevated. Market upside is supported by momentum, but higher bond yields and a still-elevated oil-volatility (OVX) introduce dispersion and interest-rate sensitivity risk. Monitor mortgage rates and the income spread: higher yields can pressure duration-sensitive assets and shift investor preference toward yield-bearing instruments if the spread stays negative.
Market summary: - Market regime: 🟢 Recovery; conditions stable. - SPY: 739.30, trading above its 200-day MA (MA200 = 673.95) — bullish trend. - QQQ: 713.29, above its 100-day MA (MA100 = 619.43) — tech momentum intact. - VIX: 18.38 — moderate volatility. - TNX / 10-year yield: 4.42% — materially higher yields vs. recent years; a tailwind for bond income but a headwind for rate-sensitive equities. - Income spread (S&P dividend yield 1.0% vs 10Y 4.42%): spread = -3.42% — favors bonds (Bond Yield Advantage). - Mortgage rate: 6.37% — condition: Neutral. - OVX: 75.66 — regime: mid; oil-volatility elevated, adds event-driven risk. - ARKK 3-month change: +10.75% — risk-on flows into high-growth/innovation names.
Raw data available in /data.

item.title: Market Regime: 🟢 Recovery
item.description:
This is an automated market signal summary for informational purposes only. It is not financial advice.
Risk commentary: Markets are in a recovery phase with calm-to-moderate volatility, but elevated oil and real-rate pressures could cap cyclicals and tech upside. The primary risks are a re-acceleration in inflation (pushing yields higher), a spike in equity volatility, or an unexpected deterioration in credit conditions. Monitor yields and OVX for early signs of regime change; otherwise current conditions look stable.
Market summary: - Regime: Recovery (🟢) - SPY: 737.62, well above 200-day MA 673.43 — trend bullish and stable - QQQ: 711.23, above 100-day MA 618.40 — tech participation supportive - VIX: 17.19 — moderate, consistent with a stable recovery - TNX (10Y yield): 4.38% — higher real-yield environment weighing on duration-sensitive names - Income spread (S&P dividend yield 1.0% vs 10Y 4.38%): spread = -3.38% — favors bonds (Bond Yield Advantage) - Mortgage rate: 6.37% — condition: Neutral - OVX: 72.15 — regime: mid (elevated oil volatility that could affect energy and inflation dynamics) - ARKK: 3-month change +9.22% — selective active/innovation exposure gaining - Conditions summary: broadly stable for now; raw data available in /data

item.title: Market Regime: 🟢 Recovery
item.description:
This is an automated market signal summary for informational purposes only. It is not financial advice.
Risk commentary: Risk appetite is improving as equities continue to outperform and volatility remains moderate, but elevated oil volatility and a positive 10-year yield keep interest-rate and energy-price risks in play. Monitor rates and OVX for potential regime shifts; if yields or oil volatility move higher, equity performance could quickly re-price.
Market summary: - Market regime: Recovery (stable) - SPY: 731.58, trading above 200-day MA (200‑day MA = 672.91) — bullish trend - QQQ: 694.94, trading well above its 100-day MA (100‑day MA = 617.42) - VIX: 17.08 — moderate, stable equity volatility - TNX (10‑yr yield): 4.41% — elevated yield backdrop supporting income assets - Income spread (SP dividend yield 1.0% vs 10Y 4.41%): spread = -3.41% — favors bonds (Bond Yield Advantage) - OVX: 72.25, regime = mid — oil volatility remains elevated, watch for energy-driven risk - ARKK: 3‑month change +10.68% — growth/alpha exposure recovering - Mortgage rate: unknown (null); condition: Unknown — data unavailable - Overall tone: constructive but rate- and oil-volatility sensitive; conditions currently stable
Raw data available in /data.

item.title: Market Regime: 🟢 Recovery
item.description:
This is an automated market signal summary for informational purposes only. It is not financial advice.
Risk commentary: Markets are in a recovery phase with equities extended above long-term averages and volatility subdued, but elevated oil volatility and rising yields pose conditional risks to cyclical and growth names. Monitor yields and OVX for signs of stress; otherwise current conditions appear stable.
Market summary: - Regime: Recovery (🟢) - SPY: 733.83, trading above 200-day MA (672.40) — upward trend, conditions stable - QQQ: 695.77, above 100-day MA (616.73) — tech breadth supportive - ARKK: three-month change +19.98% — strong momentum in innovation names - VIX: 17.39 — low/moderate volatility environment - TNX (10Y yield): 4.36% — higher yield environment that can pressure long-duration assets - Income spread (S&P dividend yield 1.01% vs 10Y 4.36%): spread = -3.35% — favors bonds over equities - OVX: 72.34 (regime: mid) — oil volatility elevated, a risk for energy-sensitive sectors - Mortgage rate: 6.37% (Condition: Neutral) — housing financing remains a headwind but stable - Overall risk posture: equity-friendly momentum but watch rising yields and elevated OVX; raw data available in /data.
